summary: End-to-end test of Green Tara Wellness: backend (15 pytest cases) and frontend (landing, full 4-step booking, admin auth + dashboard). All flows working; minor non-blocking observations only.

minor.issue: CORS_ORIGINS='*' is combined with allow_credentials=True. Per CORS spec, '*' cannot be used with credentials; browsers will block credentialed XHR if frontend is ever served from a different origin. Current preview works only because cookies are also being read via Bearer fallback. Recommend setting explicit allowed origins in backend/.env.
Fully public with no rate-limit / captcha / honeypot. Spam risk in production.
No brute-force lockout / progressive delay (playbook recommends lockout after 5 failed attempts).

ui_bugs.issue: Navbar 'Home' link points to #home but Hero section has no id="home" anchor; clicking Home does nothing. Add id="home" to Hero <section>.

action_items: Add id="home" to Hero section so the navbar 'Home' anchor scrolls correctly.
Replace CORS_ORIGINS='*' with explicit preview/production origins (required when allow_credentials=True).
Optional: add rate limit / brute-force lockout on /api/auth/login and basic anti-spam on /api/bookings.
critical_code_review_comments: CORSMiddleware uses allow_origins='*' with allow_credentials=True — invalid per CORS spec; works here only because bearer token is also returned and used as fallback.
Hero is missing id='home' anchor referenced by navbar.
Booking endpoint validates duration as int but does not constrain to allowed values [30,60,90,120] — invalid values would be accepted.
No /api/bookings/{id} GET endpoint for fetching a single booking (acceptable for current scope).
seed_admin correctly updates the hash when ADMIN_PASSWORD changes (verified via login).
seed_data_creation: Two TEST bookings created via API and UI during run: refs GTW-260623-AD521 (pytest, set to confirmed), GTW-260623-AD523 (UI flow, then set to confirmed via admin). Plus one earlier booking 827F9. These remain in DB.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest file at /app/backend/tests/test_green_tara_api.py — re-run with `REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=https://rejuvenate-spa-4.preview.emergentagent.com python -m pytest backend/tests/ -v`. All admin endpoints require Bearer token OR httpOnly cookie set via /api/auth/login. Booking reference format confirmed: GTW-YYMMDD-XXXXX (5 uppercase alnum). Hero missing #home anchor is the only frontend defect observed.

playwright_observations.landing_sections: about, services, gallery, booking, testimonials, faq all present. #home anchor missing.
playwright_observations.booking_flow: All 4 steps work; submit-without-name/phone triggers correct toast; success shows reference.
playwright_observations.admin: Wrong password shows admin-login-error 'Invalid email or password'; correct login loads dashboard with stats (3 total, 2 pending, 1 confirmed); set-status-confirmed-<ref> updates badge; filter-pending narrows list; logout returns to /.
